message.entry: Bad working directory. Details: {0}.
The function name "{0}" is ambiguous within the file {1}.
Cannot find builtin function ''{0}''
Cannot find function "{0}".
Cannot find function "{0}" within "{1}".
Cannot find local function "{0}".
Multiple conflicting MATLAB_FCN_REGs found for "{0}".\n MATLAB_FCN_REGs must differ in name, type, attributes, or priority.
Directory name too long: "{0}"
Directory name not found: "{0}"
When specifying files that are not on MATLAB's current search path, a file extension is required.
Symbol for ''{0}'' not found in ''{1}''.\n{2}
Cell array argument to inmem() must contain only character arrays.
Invalid function name ''{0}''
Invalid path ''{0}''
Function table size check fails for ''{0}'': , library claims {1,number,integer}, registry claims {2}
Library integrity check fails for ''{0}'': , library built {1}, registry built {2}
Can't load ''{0}'': {1}
Can''t find the resource file ''{0}'' needed by ''{1}''
Can''t reload ''{0}''
"{0}" must be called from a file.
The file ''{0}'' is not locked.
Function {0} has the same name as a MATLAB builtin. We suggest you rename the function to avoid a potential name conflict.
Function "{0}" does not exist or is shadowed.
No signature for {0} is available.
Trying to load file "{0}" while it is being loaded.
In the directory "{0}", {1} now shadows {2}.\n Please see the MATLAB 7.1 Release Notes.
Unable to ensure a valid workspace for the function {0} within {1}.\nPlease recreate the function handle to {2}.\n
Unable to find file {0}.
Unable to find function {0} within {1}.
Unable to locate {0} as a function on the MATLAB path
{0} is not a valid argument
Could not find appropriate function on path loading function handle
Could not find appropriate function on path loading function handle {0}{1}{2}
Unable to find function ''{0}''. Component {1} has an unknown dependency {2}.
Unable to find file ''{0}''. Component {1} reexports unregistered component {2}.
No constructor ''{0}'' with matching signature found.
Function ''{0}'' can only be called from within a method.
Class ''{0}'' cannot be a subclass or a superclass of itself.
The precedence between classes ''{0}'' and ''{1}'' cannot be changed without first typing ''clear classes''.
''{0}'' is not a known class.
Unknown class ''{0}'' used in builtin function ''{1}''.
Cannot redefine class ''{0}'' without a call to ''clear classes''.
Base object for class ''{0}'' constructor is invalid.
The ''{0}'' class cannot be used in its own class definition as a base class, property value, or attribute value.
Failure attempting to construct class ''{0}'' as it contains a field ''{1}'' which matches the name of a parent class.
The superclass ''{0}'' has been specified more than once.
The size of the struct array being made into an object and the size of the parent objects must be consistent.
The CLASS function must be called from a class constructor.
The first argument to function CLASS must be a struct.
The name ''{0}'' is not a valid class name.
Cannot change the number of parents of class ''{0}'' without first typing ''clear classes''.
Cannot change the number of fields of class ''{0}'' without first typing ''clear classes''.
Field names and base classes of class ''{0}'' cannot be changed without first typing ''clear classes''.
The constructor for class ''{0}'' must return only one output value.
Failed to initialize MATLAB path {0}. Exiting MATLAB.\n
MATLAB Path initialized in {0} seconds.\n
Unable to execute matlabpath. The function has been disabled in this MATLAB session.
Unable to determine if ''{0}'' is a function. The MATLAB Path or current folder changed too many times during the search.
